title: Curios Dark Mode
body:
This is a resource pack to retexture the [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) GUI. It is intended to work in complement with the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) dark GUI resource pack.

If you have any suggestions/feedback/issues you can dm me on discord, my username is 
`bitcyber`

Planned features:
- ✅ ~~Charm of Undying Compatability~~
- ✅ ~~Elytra Slot Compatability~~
- ✅ ~~Shulker Box Slot Compatability~~
- ✅ ~~Update to 1.21~~
